content.body: 😭 implementers don't use the "can run user code" feature
we should write a "how to read the spec" doc

also, it's just occurred to me that we are currently manually doing that "can run user code" for `[[GetPrototypeOf]]` etc invocations, and with https://github.com/tc39/ecma262/pull/3912 that could start to be automatic, with some extra work

content.body: We should maybe show a hint on how to see the help box somewhere more visible than knowing to press ?
Like, at the top/bottom of the sidebar
possibly also that but there's a bunch of other knowledge around e.g. the References pane, pins, etc
